title: Cree's Dynamic Doors
description: Double doors will now open and close together or synchronize if one is open and the other is closed!
body:
## What does this mod do?
- It adds a game mechanic that allows two inwards facing doors to open and close together. 
  This works with all doors that are openable by hand.

## How do i add compatability to my mod?
- Use the tag below for your own doors. Because the mod uses blockstates, make sure your doors use the vanilla namespace!



```
doubledoors:doors
```
